Bash("C:\\Users\\vkudu\\claude-projects\\polymarket-copy-trader\\wallet_deep_analysis.py" << 'PYEOF'
"""
Deep multi-variable analysis of Polymarket wallets for copy trading suitability.
Queries activity, positions, and leaderboard data to score each wallet.
"""

import requests
import time
import statistics
from collections import defaultdict
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

# -- Wallet definitions --
WALLETS = {
    "WoofMaster":       "0x916f7165c2c836aba22edb6453cdbb5f3ea253ba",
    "bcda":             "0xb45a797faa52b0fd8adc56d30382022b7b12192c",
    "gatorr":           "0x93abbc022ce98d6f45d4444b594791cc4b7a9723",
    "majorexploiter":   "0x019782cab5d844f02bafb71f512758be78579f3c",
    "jtwyslljy":        "0x9cb990f1862568a63d8601efeebe0304225c32f2",
    "MinorKey4":        "0xb90494d9a5d8f71f1930b2aa4b599f95c344c255",
    "therighteousdog":  "0x3fd9a838ded6eb832baab3ccbcb5e934e3871ef0",
    "UAEVALORANTFAN":   "0xc65ca4755436f82d8eb461e65781584b8cadea39",
    "Supah9ga":         "0x57cd939930fd119067ca9dc42b22b3e15708a0fb",
}

BASE_URL = "https://data-api.polymarket.com"

# -- Category keywords --
CRYPTO_KEYWORDS = [
    "bitcoin", "btc", "ethereum", "eth", "crypto", "solana", "sol", "xrp",
    "doge", "cardano", "ada", "bnb", "avax", "matic", "polygon", "chainlink",
    "link", "litecoin", "ltc", "token", "defi", "nft", "memecoin", "meme coin",
    "shib", "pepe", "sui", "ton", "above", "below", "price",
]
SPORTS_KEYWORDS = [
    "nba", "nfl", "mlb", "nhl", "soccer", "football", "basketball", "baseball",
    "tennis", "golf", "f1", "formula", "ufc", "mma", "boxing", "cricket",
    "premier league", "champions league", "world cup", "super bowl", "series",
    "game", "match", "win the", "championship", "playoff", "finals", "mvp",
    "march madness", "ncaa", "college", "team", "player", "score",
    "stanley cup", "world series", "grand prix", "olympics",
]
POLITICS_KEYWORDS = [
    "trump", "biden", "election", "president", "congress", "senate", "house",
    "democrat", "republican", "gop", "vote", "poll", "political", "governor",
    "primary", "candidate", "impeach", "legislation", "bill", "act",
    "supreme court", "scotus", "cabinet", "secretary", "fed ", "federal reserve",
    "tariff", "executive order", "state of the union",
]


def categorize_market\(title\):
    """Categorize a market title into crypto/sports/politics/other."""
    t = title.lower\(\)
    if any\(kw in t for kw in SPORTS_KEYWORDS\):
        return "sports"
    if any\(kw in t for kw in POLITICS_KEYWORDS\):
        return "politics"
    if any\(kw in t for kw in CRYPTO_KEYWORDS\):
        return "crypto"
    return "other"


def fetch_json\(url, params=None, retries=3\):
    """Fetch JSON from URL with retries and rate-limit delays."""
    for attempt in range\(retries\):
        try:
            resp = requests.get\(url, params=params, timeout=30\)
            if resp.status_code == 200:
                return resp.json\(\)
            elif resp.status_code == 429:
                wait = 5 * \(attempt + 1\)
                print\(f"    Rate limited, waiting {wait}s..."\)
                time.sleep\(wait\)
            else:
                print\(f"    HTTP {resp.status_code} for {url}"\)
                return None
        except requests.RequestException as e:
            print\(f"    Request error \(attempt {attempt+1}\): {e}"\)
            time.sleep\(2\)
    return None


def fetch_all_paginated\(url, params, limit_key="limit", max_pages=20\):
    """Fetch paginated results, returning all items."""
    all_items = []
    offset = 0
    limit = int\(params.get\(limit_key, 500\)\)
    for page in range\(max_pages\):
        p = {**params, "offset": str\(offset\)}
        data = fetch_json\(url, p\)
        time.sleep\(1\)
        if not data or not isinstance\(data, list\) or len\(data\) == 0:
            break
        all_items.extend\(data\)
        if len\(data\) < limit:
            break
        offset += limit
    return all_items


def fetch_wallet_data\(name, address\):
    """Fetch activity and positions for a wallet."""
    print\(f"\\n{'='*70}"\)
    print\(f"Fetching data for {name} \({address[:10]}...\)"\)
    print\(f"{'='*70}"\)

    # 1. Activity \(trades\)
    print\("  Fetching activity \(trades\)..."\)
    activity = fetch_all_paginated\(
        f"{BASE_URL}/activity",
        {"user": address, "type": "TRADE", "limit": "500",
         "sortBy": "TIMESTAMP", "sortDirection": "DESC"},
    \)
    print\(f"    Got {len\(activity\)} trades"\)
    time.sleep\(1\)

    # 2. Positions \(by current value\)
    print\("  Fetching positions..."\)
    positions = fetch_all_paginated\(
        f"{BASE_URL}/positions",
        {"user": address, "limit": "500",
         "sortBy": "CURRENT_VALUE", "sortDirection": "DESC"},
    \)
    print\(f"    Got {len\(positions\)} positions"\)
    time.sleep\(1\)

    return {"activity": activity, "positions": positions}


def safe_float\(val, default=0.0\):
    """Convert to float safely."""
    if val is None:
        return default
    try:
        return float\(val\)
    except \(ValueError, TypeError\):
        return default


def analyze_wallet\(name, address, data\):
    """Analyze wallet data and produce metrics."""
    activity = data["activity"]
    positions = data["positions"]

    result = {"name": name, "address": address}

    # -- Trading Pattern --
    result["total_positions"] = len\(positions\)

    active = [p for p in positions if not p.get\("resolved", False\)]
    resolved = [p for p in positions if p.get\("resolved", False\)]
    result["active_positions"] = len\(active\)
    result["resolved_positions"] = len\(resolved\)

    # Trade sizes from activity
    trade_sizes = []
    buy_count = 0
    sell_count = 0
    market_titles = set\(\)
    market_categories = defaultdict\(int\)

    for trade in activity:
        size = safe_float\(trade.get\("usdcSize"\) or trade.get\("value"\)\)
        if size > 0:
            trade_sizes.append\(size\)
        side = \(trade.get\("side"\) or trade.get\("type"\) or ""\).upper\(\)
        if "BUY" in side:
            buy_count += 1
        elif "SELL" in side:
            sell_count += 1
        title = trade.get\("title"\) or trade.get\("question"\) or trade.get\("marketTitle"\) or ""
        if title:
            market_titles.add\(title\)
            cat = categorize_market\(title\)
            market_categories[cat] += 1

    # Also gather titles from positions
    for pos in positions:
        title = pos.get\("title"\) or pos.get\("question"\) or pos.get\("marketTitle"\) or ""
        if title:
            market_titles.add\(title\)

    result["total_trades"] = len\(activity\)
    result["avg_trade_size"] = statistics.mean\(trade_sizes\) if trade_sizes else 0
    result["median_trade_size"] = statistics.median\(trade_sizes\) if trade_sizes else 0
    result["max_trade_size"] = max\(trade_sizes\) if trade_sizes else 0
    result["buy_count"] = buy_count
    result["sell_count"] = sell_count
    result["buy_sell_ratio"] = buy_count / max\(sell_count, 1\)
    result["unique_markets"] = len\(market_titles\)
    result["market_categories"] = dict\(market_categories\)

    # -- Performance --
    cash_pnls = []
    for pos in positions:
        pnl = safe_float\(pos.get\("cashPnl"\) or pos.get\("pnl"\) or pos.get\("realizedPnl"\)\)
        cash_pnls.append\(pnl\)

    result["total_pnl"] = sum\(cash_pnls\)

    wins = [p for p in cash_pnls if p > 0]
    losses = [p for p in cash_pnls if p < 0]
    breakeven = [p for p in cash_pnls if p == 0]

    result["win_count"] = len\(wins\)
    result["loss_count"] = len\(losses\)
    result["breakeven_count"] = len\(breakeven\)
    result["win_rate"] = len\(wins\) / max\(len\(wins\) + len\(losses\), 1\) * 100

    result["avg_win"] = statistics.mean\(wins\) if wins else 0
    result["avg_loss"] = abs\(statistics.mean\(losses\)\) if losses else 0
    result["win_loss_ratio"] = result["avg_win"] / max\(result["avg_loss"], 0.01\)

    gross_wins = sum\(wins\)
    gross_losses = abs\(sum\(losses\)\)
    result["gross_wins"] = gross_wins
    result["gross_losses"] = gross_losses
    result["profit_factor"] = gross_wins / max\(gross_losses, 0.01\)

    result["best_trade"] = max\(cash_pnls\) if cash_pnls else 0
    result["worst_trade"] = min\(cash_pnls\) if cash_pnls else 0

    # -- Risk Metrics --
    result["largest_loss"] = min\(cash_pnls\) if cash_pnls else 0

    # Max drawdown
    cumulative = 0
    peak = 0
    max_dd = 0
    for pnl in cash_pnls:
        cumulative += pnl
        if cumulative > peak:
            peak = cumulative
        dd = peak - cumulative
        if dd > max_dd:
            max_dd = dd
    result["max_drawdown"] = max_dd

    # Largest losing streak
    max_streak = 0
    current_streak = 0
    for pnl in cash_pnls:
        if pnl < 0:
            current_streak += 1
            max_streak = max\(max_streak, current_streak\)
        else:
            current_streak = 0
    result["max_losing_streak"] = max_streak

    # Concentration risk
    if cash_pnls and result["total_pnl"] > 0:
        sorted_pnl = sorted\(cash_pnls, reverse=True\)
        top3 = sum\(sorted_pnl[:3]\)
        result["top3_concentration"] = top3 / max\(result["total_pnl"], 0.01\) * 100
    else:
        result["top3_concentration"] = 0

    result["risk_reward"] = result["avg_win"] / max\(result["avg_loss"], 0.01\)

    # -- Margin estimate --
    if result["avg_trade_size"] > 0 and len\(wins\) + len\(losses\) > 0:
        avg_abs_pnl = statistics.mean\([abs\(p\) for p in cash_pnls if p != 0]\) if any\(p != 0 for p in cash_pnls\) else 0
        result["avg_margin_pct"] = avg_abs_pnl / result["avg_trade_size"] * 100
    else:
        result["avg_margin_pct"] = 0

    # -- Trade frequency --
    timestamps = []
    for trade in activity:
        ts = trade.get\("timestamp"\) or trade.get\("createdAt"\) or trade.get\("time"\)
        if ts:
            try:
                if isinstance\(ts, \(int, float\)\):
                    dt = datetime.fromtimestamp\(ts / 1000 if ts > 1e12 else ts\)
                else:
                    ts_str = str\(ts\).replace\("Z", ""\).replace\("+00:00", ""\)
                    if "T" in ts_str:
                        dt = datetime.fromisoformat\(ts_str\)
                    else:
                        dt = datetime.fromtimestamp\(float\(ts_str\)\)
                timestamps.append\(dt\)
            except \(ValueError, OSError\):
                pass

    if len\(timestamps\) >= 2:
        timestamps.sort\(\)
        span_days = max\(\(timestamps[-1] - timestamps[0]\).days, 1\)
        result["trades_per_day"] = len\(activity\) / span_days
        result["trading_span_days"] = span_days
    else:
        result["trades_per_day"] = 0
        result["trading_span_days"] = 0

    return result


def check_leaderboards\(wallets\):
    """Check which wallets appear on weekly and monthly leaderboards."""
    print\("\\n" + "=" * 70\)
    print\("Checking leaderboards..."\)
    print\("=" * 70\)

    leaderboard_data = {}
    for name in wallets:
        leaderboard_data[name] = {"weekly": False, "monthly": False,
                                  "weekly_profit": 0, "monthly_profit": 0}

    # Fetch weekly leaderboard
    print\("  Fetching weekly leaderboard..."\)
    weekly = fetch_json\(f"{BASE_URL}/leaderboard", {"window": "week", "limit": "200"}\)
    time.sleep\(1\)

    if weekly and isinstance\(weekly, list\):
        for entry in weekly:
            addr = \(entry.get\("userAddress"\) or entry.get\("address"\) or ""\).lower\(\)
            for name, wallet_addr in wallets.items\(\):
                if addr == wallet_addr.lower\(\):
                    leaderboard_data[name]["weekly"] = True
                    leaderboard_data[name]["weekly_profit"] = safe_float\(
                        entry.get\("profit"\) or entry.get\("pnl"\) or entry.get\("amount"\)\)
                    print\(f"    Found {name} on weekly leaderboard: ${leaderboard_data[name]['weekly_profit']:.2f}"\)

    # Fetch monthly leaderboard
    print\("  Fetching monthly leaderboard..."\)
    monthly = fetch_json\(f"{BASE_URL}/leaderboard", {"window": "month", "limit": "200"}\)
    time.sleep\(1\)

    if monthly and isinstance\(monthly, list\):
        for entry in monthly:
            addr = \(entry.get\("userAddress"\) or entry.get\("address"\) or ""\).lower\(\)
            for name, wallet_addr in wallets.items\(\):
                if addr == wallet_addr.lower\(\):
                    leaderboard_data[name]["monthly"] = True
                    leaderboard_data[name]["monthly_profit"] = safe_float\(
                        entry.get\("profit"\) or entry.get\("pnl"\) or entry.get\("amount"\)\)
                    print\(f"    Found {name} on monthly leaderboard: ${leaderboard_data[name]['monthly_profit']:.2f}"\)

    return leaderboard_data


def calculate_copyability_score\(r\):
    """
    Rate each wallet 1-10 on how good a copy target they are.

    Scoring dimensions \(each 0-10, weighted\):
      1. Margin per trade \(higher = more edge, less speed-dependent\)  weight: 2.0
      2. Trade frequency \(lower = easier to copy with polling\)        weight: 1.5
      3. Win rate \(higher = better\)                                   weight: 2.0
      4. Concentration risk \(lower = better, not lucky\)               weight: 1.5
      5. Market type \(sports/politics better than crypto\)             weight: 1.0
      6. Consistency \(leaderboard presence\)                           weight: 1.0
      7. Profit factor \(higher = better\)                              weight: 1.5
      8. Max drawdown relative to P/L                                 weight: 0.5
    Total weight: 11.0
    """
    scores = {}

    # 1. Margin
    margin = r.get\("avg_margin_pct", 0\)
    if margin >= 30:
        scores["margin"] = 10
    elif margin >= 20:
        scores["margin"] = 8
    elif margin >= 10:
        scores["margin"] = 6
    elif margin >= 5:
        scores["margin"] = 4
    elif margin >= 2:
        scores["margin"] = 2
    else:
        scores["margin"] = 1

    # 2. Trade frequency -- lower is better
    tpd = r.get\("trades_per_day", 0\)
    if tpd == 0:
        scores["frequency"] = 5
    elif tpd <= 2:
        scores["frequency"] = 10
    elif tpd <= 5:
        scores["frequency"] = 8
    elif tpd <= 10:
        scores["frequency"] = 6
    elif tpd <= 20:
        scores["frequency"] = 4
    elif tpd <= 50:
        scores["frequency"] = 2
    else:
        scores["frequency"] = 1

    # 3. Win rate
    wr = r.get\("win_rate", 0\)
    if wr >= 70:
        scores["win_rate"] = 10
    elif wr >= 60:
        scores["win_rate"] = 8
    elif wr >= 55:
        scores["win_rate"] = 7
    elif wr >= 50:
        scores["win_rate"] = 5
    elif wr >= 40:
        scores["win_rate"] = 3
    else:
        scores["win_rate"] = 1

    # 4. Concentration risk -- lower is better
    conc = r.get\("top3_concentration", 0\)
    if conc <= 20:
        scores["concentration"] = 10
    elif conc <= 30:
        scores["concentration"] = 8
    elif conc <= 50:
        scores["concentration"] = 6
    elif conc <= 75:
        scores["concentration"] = 4
    elif conc <= 100:
        scores["concentration"] = 2
    else:
        scores["concentration"] = 1

    # 5. Market type
    cats = r.get\("market_categories", {}\)
    total_cat = sum\(cats.values\(\)\) or 1
    crypto_pct = cats.get\("crypto", 0\) / total_cat * 100
    sports_politics_pct = \(cats.get\("sports", 0\) + cats.get\("politics", 0\)\) / total_cat * 100

    if sports_politics_pct >= 60:
        scores["market_type"] = 10
    elif sports_politics_pct >= 40:
        scores["market_type"] = 8
    elif crypto_pct <= 30:
        scores["market_type"] = 6
    elif crypto_pct <= 50:
        scores["market_type"] = 4
    elif crypto_pct <= 70:
        scores["market_type"] = 3
    else:
        scores["market_type"] = 1

    # 6. Consistency
    weekly = r.get\("on_weekly_lb", False\)
    monthly = r.get\("on_monthly_lb", False\)
    if weekly and monthly:
        scores["consistency"] = 10
    elif monthly:
        scores["consistency"] = 7
    elif weekly:
        scores["consistency"] = 5
    else:
        scores["consistency"] = 2

    # 7. Profit factor
    pf = r.get\("profit_factor", 0\)
    if pf >= 5:
        scores["profit_factor"] = 10
    elif pf >= 3:
        scores["profit_factor"] = 8
    elif pf >= 2:
        scores["profit_factor"] = 7
    elif pf >= 1.5:
        scores["profit_factor"] = 5
    elif pf >= 1.0:
        scores["profit_factor"] = 3
    else:
        scores["profit_factor"] = 1

    # 8. Drawdown relative to P/L
    dd = r.get\("max_drawdown", 0\)
    total_pnl = r.get\("total_pnl", 0\)
    if total_pnl > 0 and dd > 0:
        dd_ratio = dd / total_pnl
        if dd_ratio <= 0.1:
            scores["drawdown"] = 10
        elif dd_ratio <= 0.2:
            scores["drawdown"] = 8
        elif dd_ratio <= 0.3:
            scores["drawdown"] = 6
        elif dd_ratio <= 0.5:
            scores["drawdown"] = 4
        else:
            scores["drawdown"] = 2
    elif total_pnl <= 0:
        scores["drawdown"] = 1
    else:
        scores["drawdown"] = 5

    # Weighted average
    weights = {
        "margin": 2.0,
        "frequency": 1.5,
        "win_rate": 2.0,
        "concentration": 1.5,
        "market_type": 1.0,
        "consistency": 1.0,
        "profit_factor": 1.5,
        "drawdown": 0.5,
    }

    total_weight = sum\(weights.values\(\)\)
    weighted_sum = sum\(scores[k] * weights[k] for k in scores\)
    final_score = weighted_sum / total_weight

    r["score_breakdown"] = scores
    r["copyability_score"] = round\(final_score, 1\)
    return final_score


def print_wallet_report\(r\):
    """Print detailed report for a single wallet."""
    print\(f"\\n{'='*70}"\)
    print\(f"  {r['name']}"\)
    print\(f"  {r['address']}"\)
    print\(f"{'='*70}"\)

    print\(f"\\n  --- Trading Pattern ---"\)
    print\(f"  Total positions:      {r['total_positions']}"\)
    print\(f"  Active \(unresolved\):  {r['active_positions']}"\)
    print\(f"  Resolved:             {r['resolved_positions']}"\)
    print\(f"  Total trades:         {r['total_trades']}"\)
    print\(f"  Avg trade size:       ${r['avg_trade_size']:,.2f}"\)
    print\(f"  Median trade size:    ${r['median_trade_size']:,.2f}"\)
    print\(f"  Max trade size:       ${r['max_trade_size']:,.2f}"\)
    print\(f"  BUY count:            {r['buy_count']}"\)
    print\(f"  SELL count:           {r['sell_count']}"\)
    print\(f"  BUY/SELL ratio:       {r['buy_sell_ratio']:.2f}"\)
    print\(f"  Unique markets:       {r['unique_markets']}"\)
    cats = r['market_categories']
    total_cat = sum\(cats.values\(\)\) or 1
    print\(f"  Market categories:"\)
    for cat in ["crypto", "sports", "politics", "other"]:
        count = cats.get\(cat, 0\)
        pct = count / total_cat * 100
        print\(f"    {cat:12s}: {count:4d} \({pct:5.1f}%\)"\)

    print\(f"\\n  --- Performance ---"\)
    print\(f"  Total realized P/L:   ${r['total_pnl']:,.2f}"\)
    print\(f"  Win rate:             {r['win_rate']:.1f}% \({r['win_count']}W / {r['loss_count']}L / {r['breakeven_count']}BE\)"\)
    print\(f"  Avg win:              ${r['avg_win']:,.2f}"\)
    print\(f"  Avg loss:             ${r['avg_loss']:,.2f}"\)
    print\(f"  Win/Loss ratio:       {r['win_loss_ratio']:.2f}"\)
    print\(f"  Profit factor:        {r['profit_factor']:.2f}"\)
    print\(f"  Best trade:           ${r['best_trade']:,.2f}"\)
    print\(f"  Worst trade:          ${r['worst_trade']:,.2f}"\)

    print\(f"\\n  --- Risk Metrics ---"\)
    print\(f"  Max drawdown:         ${r['max_drawdown']:,.2f}"\)
    print\(f"  Largest loss:         ${r['largest_loss']:,.2f}"\)
    print\(f"  Max losing streak:    {r['max_losing_streak']}"\)
    print\(f"  Top-3 concentration:  {r['top3_concentration']:.1f}%"\)
    print\(f"  Risk/Reward ratio:    {r['risk_reward']:.2f}"\)
    print\(f"  Avg margin:           {r['avg_margin_pct']:.1f}%"\)

    print\(f"\\n  --- Activity ---"\)
    print\(f"  Trades/day:           {r['trades_per_day']:.1f}"\)
    print\(f"  Trading span:         {r['trading_span_days']} days"\)

    print\(f"\\n  --- Leaderboard ---"\)
    wb = ""
    if r.get\("on_weekly_lb"\):
        wb = f" \(${r.get\('weekly_profit', 0\):,.2f}\)"
    mb = ""
    if r.get\("on_monthly_lb"\):
        mb = f" \(${r.get\('monthly_profit', 0\):,.2f}\)"
    print\(f"  Weekly leaderboard:   {'YES' if r.get\('on_weekly_lb'\) else 'NO'}{wb}"\)
    print\(f"  Monthly leaderboard:  {'YES' if r.get\('on_monthly_lb'\) else 'NO'}{mb}"\)

    print\(f"\\n  --- Copyability Score: {r['copyability_score']}/10 ---"\)
    breakdown = r.get\("score_breakdown", {}\)
    labels = {
        "margin": "Margin/Edge",
        "frequency": "Low Frequency",
        "win_rate": "Win Rate",
        "concentration": "Diversification",
        "market_type": "Market Type",
        "consistency": "Consistency",
        "profit_factor": "Profit Factor",
        "drawdown": "Drawdown Mgmt",
    }
    for key, label in labels.items\(\):
        print\(f"    {label:18s}: {breakdown.get\(key, 0\)}/10"\)


def print_comparison_table\(results\):
    """Print final comparison table sorted by copyability score."""
    results.sort\(key=lambda x: x["copyability_score"], reverse=True\)

    print\("\\n"\)
    print\("=" * 160\)
    print\("FINAL COMPARISON TABLE -- Sorted by Copyability Score"\)
    print\("=" * 160\)

    header = \(
        f"{'Rank':>4} | {'Name':>18} | {'Score':>5} | {'P/L':>12} | {'WinR%':>5} | "
        f"{'PF':>6} | {'AvgWin':>10} | {'AvgLoss':>10} | {'W/L':>5} | "
        f"{'Trades':>6} | {'T/Day':>5} | {'MaxDD':>10} | {'Top3%':>5} | "
        f"{'Margin%':>7} | {'Markets':>7} | {'TopCat':>10} | {'WkLB':>4} | {'MoLB':>4} | {'Verdict':>8}"
    \)
    print\(header\)
    print\("-" * 160\)

    for i, r in enumerate\(results, 1\):
        cats = r.get\("market_categories", {}\)
        top_cat = max\(cats, key=cats.get\) if cats else "N/A"

        score = r["copyability_score"]
        if score >= 7:
            verdict = "KEEP"
        elif score >= 5:
            verdict = "MAYBE"
        else:
            verdict = "DROP"

        row = \(
            f"{i:>4} | {r['name']:>18} | {score:>5.1f} | "
            f"${r['total_pnl']:>10,.0f} | {r['win_rate']:>5.1f} | "
            f"{r['profit_factor']:>6.2f} | ${r['avg_win']:>8,.0f} | ${r['avg_loss']:>8,.0f} | "
            f"{r['win_loss_ratio']:>5.2f} | "
            f"{r['total_trades']:>6} | {r['trades_per_day']:>5.1f} | "
            f"${r['max_drawdown']:>8,.0f} | {r['top3_concentration']:>5.1f} | "
            f"{r['avg_margin_pct']:>7.1f} | {r['unique_markets']:>7} | "
            f"{top_cat:>10} | "
            f"{'Y' if r.get\('on_weekly_lb'\) else 'N':>4} | "
            f"{'Y' if r.get\('on_monthly_lb'\) else 'N':>4} | "
            f"{verdict:>8}"
        \)
        print\(row\)

    print\("=" * 160\)

    # Print recommendations
    print\("\\n"\)
    print\("=" * 70\)
    print\("RECOMMENDATIONS"\)
    print\("=" * 70\)

    keepers = [r for r in results if r["copyability_score"] >= 7]
    maybes = [r for r in results if 5 <= r["copyability_score"] < 7]
    drops = [r for r in results if r["copyability_score"] < 5]

    print\(f"\\n  KEEP \({len\(keepers\)}\):"\)
    for r in keepers:
        cats = r.get\("market_categories", {}\)
        top_cat = max\(cats, key=cats.get\) if cats else "N/A"
        print\(f"    {r['name']:>18} -- Score {r['copyability_score']:.1f} | "
              f"${r['total_pnl']:>10,.0f} P/L | {r['win_rate']:.0f}% WR | "
              f"PF {r['profit_factor']:.1f} | {r['trades_per_day']:.1f} t/day | "
              f"Focus: {top_cat}"\)

    print\(f"\\n  MAYBE \({len\(maybes\)}\) -- Monitor / conditional keep:"\)
    for r in maybes:
        cats = r.get\("market_categories", {}\)
        top_cat = max\(cats, key=cats.get\) if cats else "N/A"
        print\(f"    {r['name']:>18} -- Score {r['copyability_score']:.1f} | "
              f"${r['total_pnl']:>10,.0f} P/L | {r['win_rate']:.0f}% WR | "
              f"PF {r['profit_factor']:.1f} | {r['trades_per_day']:.1f} t/day | "
              f"Focus: {top_cat}"\)

    print\(f"\\n  DROP \({len\(drops\)}\) -- Remove from copy list:"\)
    for r in drops:
        cats = r.get\("market_categories", {}\)
        top_cat = max\(cats, key=cats.get\) if cats else "N/A"
        print\(f"    {r['name']:>18} -- Score {r['copyability_score']:.1f} | "
              f"${r['total_pnl']:>10,.0f} P/L | {r['win_rate']:.0f}% WR | "
              f"PF {r['profit_factor']:.1f} | {r['trades_per_day']:.1f} t/day | "
              f"Focus: {top_cat}"\)

    # Detailed reasoning
    print\("\\n\\n" + "=" * 70\)
    print\("DETAILED REASONING"\)
    print\("=" * 70\)
    for r in results:
        score = r["copyability_score"]
        verdict = "KEEP" if score >= 7 else \("MAYBE" if score >= 5 else "DROP"\)
        print\(f"\\n  {r['name']} \({verdict}, {score:.1f}/10\):"\)
        breakdown = r.get\("score_breakdown", {}\)

        strengths = [k for k, v in breakdown.items\(\) if v >= 7]
        weaknesses = [k for k, v in breakdown.items\(\) if v <= 3]

        labels = {
            "margin": "High margin/edge per trade",
            "frequency": "Low trade frequency \(easy to copy\)",
            "win_rate": "Strong win rate",
            "concentration": "Well-diversified \(not dependent on lucky trades\)",
            "market_type": "Favorable market types \(sports/politics\)",
            "consistency": "Consistent across timeframes \(leaderboard presence\)",
            "profit_factor": "Strong profit factor",
            "drawdown": "Good drawdown management",
        }
        weak_labels = {
            "margin": "Low margin per trade \(speed-dependent, hard to copy\)",
            "frequency": "High trade frequency \(hard to keep up with polling\)",
            "win_rate": "Low win rate",
            "concentration": "Concentrated P/L \(few lucky trades drive results\)",
            "market_type": "Mostly crypto markets \(fast-moving, hard to copy\)",
            "consistency": "Not on leaderboards \(inconsistent\)",
            "profit_factor": "Weak profit factor",
            "drawdown": "Poor drawdown management",
        }

        if strengths:
            print\(f"    Strengths:"\)
            for s in strengths:
                print\(f"      + {labels.get\(s, s\)} \({breakdown[s]}/10\)"\)
        if weaknesses:
            print\(f"    Weaknesses:"\)
            for w in weaknesses:
                print\(f"      - {weak_labels.get\(w, w\)} \({breakdown[w]}/10\)"\)


def main\(\):
    print\("=" * 70\)
    print\("POLYMARKET WALLET DEEP ANALYSIS"\)
    print\(f"Date: {datetime.now\(\).strftime\('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'\)}"\)
    print\(f"Wallets: {len\(WALLETS\)}"\)
    print\("=" * 70\)

    # Fetch all wallet data
    all_data = {}
    for name, address in WALLETS.items\(\):
        all_data[name] = fetch_wallet_data\(name, address\)

    # Analyze each wallet
    results = []
    for name, address in WALLETS.items\(\):
        r = analyze_wallet\(name, address, all_data[name]\)
        results.append\(r\)

    # Check leaderboards
    lb_data = check_leaderboards\(WALLETS\)
    for r in results:
        name = r["name"]
        r["on_weekly_lb"] = lb_data[name]["weekly"]
        r["on_monthly_lb"] = lb_data[name]["monthly"]
        r["weekly_profit"] = lb_data[name]["weekly_profit"]
        r["monthly_profit"] = lb_data[name]["monthly_profit"]

    # Calculate copyability scores
    for r in results:
        calculate_copyability_score\(r\)

    # Print individual reports
    for r in results:
        print_wallet_report\(r\)

    # Print comparison table
    print_comparison_table\(results\)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main\(\)
PYEOF)
